'''ngozhazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eucephalic|eucephalic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-zh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eucephalic|eucephalic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngozhazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngozhazithi|ngozhazithi]] || [[word:ngozhaziji|ngozhaziji]] || [[word:ngozhazishi|ngozhazishi]] || [[word:ngozhaziki|ngozhaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngozhazuthuthu|ngozhazuthuthu]] || [[word:ngozhazujuju|ngozhazujuju]] || [[word:ngozhazushushu|ngozhazushushu]] || [[word:ngozhazukuku|ngozhazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngozhazuthu|ngozhazuthu]] || [[word:ngozhazuju|ngozhazuju]] || [[word:ngozhazushu|ngozhazushu]] || [[word:ngozhazuku|ngozhazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngozhazufthuf|ngozhazufthuf]] || [[word:ngozhazufjuf|ngozhazufjuf]] || [[word:ngozhazufshuf|ngozhazufshuf]] || [[word:ngozhazufkuf|ngozhazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngozhazethe|ngozhazethe]] || [[word:ngozhazeje|ngozhazeje]] || [[word:ngozhazeshe|ngozhazeshe]] || [[word:ngozhazeke|ngozhazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngozhazothotho|ngozhazothotho]] || [[word:ngozhazojojo|ngozhazojojo]] || [[word:ngozhazoshosho|ngozhazoshosho]] || [[word:ngozhazokoko|ngozhazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngozhazotho|ngozhazotho]] || [[word:ngozhazojo|ngozhazojo]] || [[word:ngozhazosho|ngozhazosho]] || [[word:ngozhazoko|ngozhazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngozhazofthof|ngozhazofthof]] || [[word:ngozhazofjof|ngozhazofjof]] || [[word:ngozhazofshof|ngozhazofshof]] || [[word:ngozhazofkof|ngozhazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŻfthĂŻf|ngozhazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŻfjĂŻf|ngozhazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŻfshĂŻf|ngozhazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŻfkĂŻf|ngozhazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngozhazĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngozhazĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngozhazĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngozhazĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŻfthĂŻf|ngozhazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŻfjĂŻf|ngozhazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŻfshĂŻf|ngozhazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŻfkĂŻf|ngozhazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŻfthĂŻf|ngozhazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŻfjĂŻf|ngozhazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŻfshĂŻf|ngozhazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŻfkĂŻf|ngozhazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŠthĂŠ|ngozhazĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŠjĂŠ|ngozhazĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŠshĂŠ|ngozhazĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngozhazĂŠkĂŠ|ngozhazĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngozhazathatha|ngozhazathatha]] || [[word:ngozhazajaja|ngozhazajaja]] || [[word:ngozhazashasha|ngozhazashasha]] || [[word:ngozhazakaka|ngozhazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngozhazatha|ngozhazatha]] || [[word:ngozhazaja|ngozhazaja]] || [[word:ngozhazasha|ngozhazasha]] || [[word:ngozhazaka|ngozhazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngozhazafthaf|ngozhazafthaf]] || [[word:ngozhazafjaf|ngozhazafjaf]] || [[word:ngozhazafshaf|ngozhazafshaf]] || [[word:ngozhazafkaf|ngozhazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngozhazasha|ngozhazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngozhazshĂ«sha|ngozhazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngozhazrosha|ngozhazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngozhazmusha|ngozhazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngozhazyasha|ngozhazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongozhaznkshĂ«sha|gongozhaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongozhaznkrosha|gongozhaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongozhaznkmusha|gongozhaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongozhaznkyasha|gongozhaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngozhazhazasha|ngozhazhazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngozhazhazshĂ«sha|ngozhazhazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngozhazhazrosha|ngozhazhazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngozhazhazmusha|ngozhazhazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngozhazhazyasha|ngozhazhazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongozhazhaznkshĂ«sha|gongozhazhaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongozhazhaznkrosha|gongozhazhaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongozhazhaznkmusha|gongozhazhaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongozhazhaznkyasha|gongozhazhaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngezhĂŠzasha|ngezhĂŠzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngezhĂŠzshĂ«sha|ngezhĂŠzshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngezhĂŠzrosha|ngezhĂŠzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngezhĂŠzmusha|ngezhĂŠzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngezhĂŠzyasha|ngezhĂŠzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongezhĂŠznkshĂ«sha|gongezhĂŠznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongezhĂŠznkrosha|gongezhĂŠznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongezhĂŠznkmusha|gongezhĂŠznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongezhĂŠznkyasha|gongezhĂŠznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngozhfazasha|ngozhfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngozhfazshĂ«sha|ngozhfazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngozhfazrosha|ngozhfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngozhfazmusha|ngozhfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngozhfazyasha|ngozhfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongozhfaznkshĂ«sha|gongozhfaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongozhfaznkrosha|gongozhfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongozhfaznkmusha|gongozhfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongozhfaznkyasha|gongozhfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
